details: The agent ran appropriate kubectl commands against the cluster (get deployments/replicasets/pods, describe pod, describe deployment) and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False and reason ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is the invalid image tag 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the new v2 pod, while the old v1 ReplicaSet continues serving traffic.
